key_principles.title: Introduction
key_principles.speaker: President Dallin H. Oaks
key_principles.principle: Solemnly sustaining Church leaders reaffirms faith in the resurrected Jesus Christ as the head of His Church.

key_principles.title: Solemn Assembly
key_principles.speaker: Presented by President D. Todd Christofferson
key_principles.principle: Members unite in faith as they sustain the Lord’s chosen prophet, apostles, and Church leaders.

key_principles.title: About His Business
key_principles.speaker: Elder Patrick Kearon
key_principles.principle: Serving faithfully in Church callings joins us with the Savior in His work and deepens discipleship.

key_principles.title: Ministering—“That Ye Love One Another; as I Have Loved You”
key_principles.speaker: Sister Kristin M. Yee
key_principles.principle: True ministering is a covenant way of becoming like Jesus Christ by loving and serving individuals as He does.

key_principles.title: Come Home
key_principles.speaker: Elder Clark G. Gilbert
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ lovingly calls all who feel distant to come home through His grace and the covenant path.

key_principles.title: All Who Have Endured Valiantly
key_principles.speaker: Elder David A. Bednar
key_principles.principle: Enduring to the end is lifelong transformation through Christ’s grace, covenants, spiritual gifts, and charity.

key_principles.title: Follow the Prophet; He Knows the Way
key_principles.speaker: Elder Michael John U. Teh
key_principles.principle: Following living prophets helps us follow Jesus Christ and reflect His light in a changing world.

key_principles.title: Tithing—Putting God First
key_principles.speaker: Elder Jorge T. Becerra
key_principles.principle: Paying tithes and offerings puts God first and increases spiritual power, direction, and devotion.

key_principles.title: Prayers for Peace
key_principles.speaker: President Henry B. Eyring
key_principles.principle: Continual heartfelt prayer invites the Savior’s peace and sustaining help in every circumstance.

key_principles.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
key_principles.speaker: Presented by President D. Todd Christofferson
key_principles.principle: Sustaining Church leaders expresses covenant support, unity, and gratitude for those called to serve.

key_principles.title: Church Auditing Department Report, 2025
key_principles.speaker: Presented by Jared B. Larson
key_principles.principle: The Church’s sacred funds are administered with accountability, approved policies, and sound financial principles.

key_principles.title: Lost Luggage, Redeemed Souls
key_principles.speaker: Elder Gary E. Stevenson
key_principles.principle: Because every soul is precious, disciples minister with careful Christlike attention so none are forgotten or lost.

key_principles.title: Christ—Author and Finisher of Our Faith
key_principles.speaker: Elder Eduardo F. Ortega
key_principles.principle: Lifelong discipleship requires a personal testimony of Jesus Christ and steady daily progress on the covenant path.

key_principles.title: “I Will Give Away All My Sins to Know Thee”
key_principles.speaker: Elder Wan-Liang Wu
key_principles.principle: Through faith, repentance, and yielding our sins, we come to know the Father through Jesus Christ.

key_principles.title: Jesus Christ Is Not Our Burden; He Is Our Relief
key_principles.speaker: Brother David J. Wunderli
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ is the source of relief, strength, forgiveness, and hope as we walk with Him daily.

key_principles.title: Love All; Love Each
key_principles.speaker: Elder Gérald Caussé
key_principles.principle: Christlike love embraces all humanity while personally caring for each individual soul.

key_principles.title: Jesus Christ Is the Way
key_principles.speaker: Elder Brian J. Holmes
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ is the only covenant path home, and we remain safe by keeping covenants and following His prophet.

key_principles.title: He Knows You by Name
key_principles.speaker: Elder Clement M. Matswagothata
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ knows us personally and gives covenant power as we take His name upon ourselves.

key_principles.title: Jesus Christ—the True Vine
key_principles.speaker: Elder Ulisses Soares
key_principles.principle: Spiritual survival depends on consciously abiding in Jesus Christ amid the distracting voices of the world.

key_principles.title: Encounter at the Empty Tomb
key_principles.speaker: President Dieter F. Uchtdorf
key_principles.principle: A personal witness that Jesus Christ lives changes us and moves us to share that witness through discipleship.

key_principles.title: Best Days and Worst Days
key_principles.speaker: President Emily Belle Freeman
key_principles.principle: Because of Jesus Christ, divine promises sustain us through both best and worst days with hope for what lies ahead.

key_principles.title: I Feel My Savior’s Love
key_principles.speaker: Elder Pedro X. Larreal
key_principles.principle: Reverently partaking of the sacrament helps us feel the Savior’s love and receive the Holy Ghost’s companionship.

key_principles.title: Choose Jesus Christ as Your Guide
key_principles.speaker: Elder Edward B. Rowe
key_principles.principle: We must choose Jesus Christ as our personal guide through life’s hidden spiritual dangers and trust His healing power.

key_principles.title: He Is Risen
key_principles.speaker: Elder Ronald A. Rasband
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ’s Resurrection conquers physical death for all and gives hope of joyful eternal reunions.

key_principles.title: Because of Jesus Christ
key_principles.speaker: Elder Dale G. Renlund
key_principles.principle: Focusing on Jesus Christ and His Atonement brings clarity, joy, forgiveness, healing, and hope.

key_principles.title: The Joy of a Covenant Relationship with God
key_principles.speaker: Elder Thierry K. Mutombo
key_principles.principle: Covenant faithfulness through Jesus Christ brings divine love, strength in sorrow, and lasting joy with God.

key_principles.title: A Peculiar Treasure
key_principles.speaker: Elder Alan R. Walker
key_principles.principle: Those who obey the Savior’s voice and keep covenants become the Lord’s treasured people and receive His blessings.

key_principles.title: Alive in Christ
key_principles.speaker: President Dallin H. Oaks
key_principles.principle: The Resurrection gives eternal perspective and calls disciples to love all people and choose peacemaking over contention.

key_principles.title: The Character of Christ
key_principles.speaker: President D. Todd Christofferson
key_principles.principle: Preparing for the Savior’s return requires a mighty change of heart so our motives and character become Christlike.

key_principles.title: Remember, Remember
key_principles.speaker: Elder Chi Hong (Sam) Wong
key_principles.principle: Remembering Jesus Christ leads us to obedience, righteous agency, covenant faithfulness, and salvation.

key_principles.title: I Glory in My Jesus
key_principles.speaker: Elder Aaron T. Hall
key_principles.principle: We deepen our relationship with Jesus Christ as we glory in His redeeming power, mercy, healing, and covenant love.

key_principles.title: “Here Am I, Send Me”
key_principles.speaker: President Susan H. Porter
key_principles.principle: Children can offer their gifts to God and help bring others to Christ through faith in His plan and Atonement.

key_principles.title: Eternal Marriage Is an Eternal Journey
key_principles.speaker: Elder Neil L. Andersen
key_principles.principle: Eternal marriage is a sacred covenant journey of becoming more like the Savior through faith, sacrifice, and enduring love.

key_principles.title: Keys, Covenants, and Easter
key_principles.speaker: Elder Quentin L. Cook
key_principles.principle: Through Christ’s Atonement, Resurrection, and restored priesthood keys, covenants can unite families eternally and bring us to the Father.

key_principles.title: Come unto Christ—Together
key_principles.speaker: Elder Taniela B. Wakolo
key_principles.principle: Families and loved ones come unto Christ together through patient faith, agency, temple covenants, and trust in God’s timing.

key_principles.title: ’Tis Eastertide: No One Walks Alone
key_principles.speaker: Elder Gerrit W. Gong
key_principles.principle: The resurrected Christ walks with us through scripture, sacrament, covenants, the Holy Ghost, and loving fellowship.

key_principles.title: Closing Remarks
key_principles.speaker: President Dallin H. Oaks
key_principles.principle: Jesus Christ is the way to peace and eternal life as we study prophetic messages and act in faith.
